allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', list\(d.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")

PowerShell($loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $loginResp.access_token; Write-Output "Got token: $\($token.Length -gt 0\)"; try { $pdfResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/r10?format=pdf&lang=en" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET; Write-Output "Status: $\($pdfResp.StatusCode\), ContentType: $\($pdfResp.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })

PowerShell(try { $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"superadmin","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $loginResp.access_token; Write-Output "Got token: $\($token.Length -gt 0\)"; try { $pdfResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/r10?format=pdf&lang=en" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET; Write-Output "Status: $\($pdfResp.StatusCode\), ContentType: $\($pdfResp.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "PDF Error status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output "PDF Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Login failed: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"superadmin","password":"Admin@1234"}'; $token = $loginResp.access_token; Write-Output "Got token: $\($token.Length -gt 0\)"; try { $pdfResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/r10?format=pdf&lang=en" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET; Write-Output "Status: $\($pdfResp.StatusCode\), ContentType: $\($pdfResp.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "PDF Error status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output "PDF Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Login failed: $_" })

PowerShell($loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"superadmin","password":"Admin@1234"}'; $token = $loginResp.access_token; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/r10?format=pdf&lang=en" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; Write-Output "HTTP $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\)"; $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($loginResp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"superadmin","password":"Admin@1234"}'; $token = $loginResp.access_token; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/r10?format=pdf&lang=en" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) ContentType=$\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) Bytes=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output "HTTP $\($resp.StatusCode.value__\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
